name: Chocolate Orgasms
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 325°F. Lightly grease an 8-inch square pan with butter or vegetable oil.
Melt the chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler placed over simmering water. Cool the mixture for 5 minutes.
In a medium-size mixing bowl, combine sugar and pour in the chocolate mixture. Mix until blended using an electric mixer on medium speed for about 25 seconds. Scrape the bowl with a rubber spatula. Add vanilla extract and mix for another 10 seconds.
Add eggs one at a time, blending after each addition until the yolk is broken and dispersed, mixing on medium-low speed for about 15 additional seconds. Scrape the bowl again and blend until velvety.
Fold in flour on low speed for 20 seconds, then finish mixing by hand to ensure any flour at the bottom of the bowl is incorporated. Stir in chopped walnuts (reserve some for sprinkling).
Spread batter evenly into prepared pan and sprinkle remaining nuts over top. Bake brownies in center oven rack until a thin crust forms and a tester inserted comes out with moist crumb, about 35 minutes.
Remove pan from oven and place on a rack to cool for 1 hour before frosting.
Frosting:
Melt chocolate in double boiler over simmering water. In an electric blender, combine evaporated milk and sugar, then add melted chocolate. Blend until thickened, taking about 50 seconds (the machine's sound will change).
Using a frosting spatula, spread frosting evenly over cooled brownies before cutting. Makes 36 small brownies.
